channel.title: Pour Over Ratio on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Pour Over Ratio on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Pour Over Coffee Technique: Ratio, Grind, Time, and Pour — The Complete Methodology
item.description: The pour over methodology — the 4 knobs (ratio, grind, time, pour pattern), diagnostic table by taste, the 4-phase pour protocol, equipment-specific timings for V60, Chemex, Kalita, Origami, and the 30-day calibration plan.

item.title: Coffee to Water Ratio Guide — Every Brewing Method Explained
item.description: The definitive coffee to water ratio guide. Learn the right ratio for espresso, French press, pour over, drip coffee, cold brew, and more — with an easy comparison table.
